title: cyclosorus moluccanus
intro: Cyclosorus moluccanus, also known as the Moluccan fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus moluccanus include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this fern are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
